case_title: WONG, ARTHUR vs. STANTON, RICK A et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON JUN-27-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER ARTHUR WONG., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-12-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT STANTON, RICK A STANTON, SHARYL DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-21-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-22-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-03-2000

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF WONG ARTHUR. HEARING SET FOR AUG-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-31-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER ARTHUR WONG, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2001 CONTINUED FROM JAN-31-2001 TO APR-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER ARTHUR WONG. HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-15-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER ARTHUR WONG, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-05-2000 CONTINUED FROM NOV-15-2000 TO JAN-31-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
